name: HW Test
description: Single-screen PASS/WARN/FAIL hardware self-test for the Fri3d Camp 2026 badge.
long_description: A single-screen hardware self-test for the Fri3d Camp 2026 badge (MicroPythonOS). Reports PASS/WARN/FAIL for display, IO expander (CH32X035), touch, NeoPixels, battery, IMU, buttons (A/B/X/Y + START), joystick, microSD, LoRa (SX1262 SPI), audio and IR. Inputs are tested interactively (tap, buttons, joystick, IR remote, SD insert/remove) and each button colour-cycles its own NeoPixel. By David Steeman, Makerspace Baasrode.
author: David Steeman
